title: Regression hunt with a minimal fix
hypothesis: Mixed: localization is delegable (sidekick runs tests, bisects), but choosing the minimal fix is judgment. Fusion should tie solo quality with less coordinator time.
prompt: After a recent change to the persistence layer, some CLI tests fail. The problem is in the store; fix it there with the smallest possible change. Do not modify callers or tests. `npm test` must pass when you are done.
